hero.title: Professional Kaspi.kz analytics right in your browser.

accuracy.title: 90% Accuracy
accuracy.desc: PriceFeed algorithms provide the highest data accuracy on the Kazakhstan market.

native.title: Native Interface
native.desc: Analytics built right into Kaspi product cards. No need to switch between tabs anymore.

speed.title: Working Speed
speed.desc: Instant data loading without delays. Work with hundreds of items in seconds.

functionality.title: Full set of analytics tools
functionality.subtitle: All functions of a professional dashboard are now available in one click right in the browser.

category.title: Analytics by each category
category.desc: Detailed analysis of market niches, sales volumes and competition level in each Kaspi category with convenient sorting

calculator.title: Built-in profitability calculator
calculator.desc: Find out which products are profitable and which are losing popularity among buyers, taking into account all expenses and commissions.

search.title: Deep Search and Analytics
search.desc: Market and sales analytics for finding profitable niches. Search by top brands, direct links and visibility in search results.

cards.title: Calculator and Cards
cards.desc: Net profit taking into account commissions. Detailed information on the card (Price, Rating, Sales, Sellers) and adding to favorites.

extension.title: Chrome Extension
extension.desc: Unlimited use of the extension for Google Chrome and Yandex Browser right in the Kaspi interface.

ecosystem.title: More than just analytics
ecosystem.subtitle: An ecosystem of tools for full control over your store on Kaspi.

unit.title: Store unit economics
unit.desc: End-to-end accounting of income and expenses. Control the margin of each sale and the net profit of the entire business.

preorders.title: Working with pre-orders
preorders.desc: Manage future receipts and orders. Plan purchases based on demand forecasts and current stock.

warehouse.title: Warehouse and logistics
warehouse.desc: Print labels, manage shipments and invoices. Automate the routine of warehouse processes in one click.

price.title: Product price management
price.desc: Automate your pricing strategy. React to competitors' changes in real time.

gold.title: Gold price changes
gold.desc: Specialized monitoring of market quotes for the jewelry business and accurate calculation of cost.
